case_title: LAWRENCE J ARMSTRONG VS. ARTHUR JACKSON RESIDENTIAL ADULT PROGRAM

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $45.00) SERVED SEP-21-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARTHUR JACKSON RESIDENTIAL ADULT PROGRAM
ORDER DENYING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL: REQUEST WAS NOT TIMELY (HEARING ON 11/8/16) & DID NOT INCLUDE A GOOD REASON FOR POSTPONEMENT
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ARTHUR JACKSON RESIDENTIAL ADULT PROGRAM
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ARTHUR JACKSON RESIDENTIAL ADULT PROGRAM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARMSTRONG, LAWRENCE J IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARTHUR JACKSON RESIDENTIAL ADULT PROGRAM THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THE CONCLUSION THAT THE PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO ANY COMPENSATION FOR SERVICES BEYOND THE APRIL 6, 2016 PAYMENT WHICH PLAINTIFF RECEIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY ARMSTRONG, LAWRENCE J AS TO DEFENDANT ARTHUR JACKSON RESIDENTIAL ADULT PROGRAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-08-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF LAWRENCE J. ARMSTRONG AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE JOHNETTA JOHNSON, ADMINISTRATOR FOR ARTHUR JACKSON RESIDENTIAL ADULT PROGRAM. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
